id: I Love You So The Walters
folderName: I Love You So The Walters
setting: Two friends are talking about a difficult breakup at a cafe.
lyrics:
I just need someone in my life to give it structure
To handle all the selfish ways I'd spend my time without her
You're everything I want, but I can't deal with all your lovers
Saying I'm the one, but it's your actions that speak louder
Giving me love when you are down and need another
I've got to get away and let you go, I've got to get over

But I love you so
I love you so
I love you so
I love you so

I'm gonna pack my things and leave you behind
This feeling's old and I know that I've made up my mind
I hope you feel what I felt when you shattered my soul
'Cause you were cruel and I'm a fool
So please let me go

But I love you so (please let me go)
I love you so (please let me go)
I love you so (please let me go)
I love you so

lyricsJa.en: I just need someone in my life to give it structure
lyricsJa.ja: 僕の人生に秩序を与えてくれる誰かが必要なんだ

lyricsJa.en: To handle all the selfish ways I'd spend my time without her
lyricsJa.ja: 彼女がいなければ身勝手に過ぎてしまう時間を、正してくれるような人が

lyricsJa.en: You're everything I want, but I can't deal with all your lovers
lyricsJa.ja: 君は僕が望むすべてだけど、他に男たちがいるのは耐えられない

lyricsJa.en: Saying I'm the one, but it's your actions that speak louder
lyricsJa.ja: 僕だけだと言いながら、君の行動がすべてを物語っている

lyricsJa.en: Giving me love when you are down and need another
lyricsJa.ja: 落ち込んで誰かを必要としている時だけ、僕に愛をくれるんだね

lyricsJa.en: I've got to get away and let you go, I've got to get over
lyricsJa.ja: 逃げ出して君を離し、この思いを吹っ切らなきゃいけないんだ
だけど、君をこんなにも愛してる
君をこんなにも愛してる
君をこんなにも愛してる
君をこんなにも愛してる

lyricsJa.en: I'm gonna pack my things and leave you behind
lyricsJa.ja: 荷物をまとめて、君を置いていくよ

lyricsJa.en: This feeling's old and I know that I've made up my mind
lyricsJa.ja: こんな思いはもうたくさんだ、決心はついているんだ

lyricsJa.en: I hope you feel what I felt when you shattered my soul
lyricsJa.ja: 僕の心を粉々に打ち砕いた時の痛みを、君も味わえばいい

lyricsJa.en: 'Cause you were cruel and I'm a fool
lyricsJa.ja: 君は残酷で、僕は愚かだったから
だからお願いだ、僕を解放してくれ

lyricsJa.en: But I love you so (please let me go)
lyricsJa.ja: だけど君をこんなにも愛してる（お願いだ 行かせてくれ）

lyricsJa.en: I love you so (please let me go)
lyricsJa.ja: 君をこんなにも愛してる（お願いだ 行かせてくれ）

lyricsJa.en: I love you so (please let me go)
lyricsJa.ja: 君をこんなにも愛してる（お願いだ 行かせてくれ）
君をこんなにも愛してる

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: So, are you really going to leave her behind?
sentences.displayHtml: So, are you really going to leave her behind?

conversation.japanese: それで、本当に彼女と別れるつもりなの？

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: This is getting old and I've finally made up my mind.
sentences.displayHtml: This is getting old and I've finally made up my mind.

conversation.japanese: ああ。もうこんな状況にはうんざりだし、ようやく決心がついたよ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: I know you felt like she was everything you want.
sentences.displayHtml: I know you felt like she was everything you want.

conversation.japanese: 残念だね。彼女は君にとって理想の相手だと思ってたのに。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: She says I'm the one, but her actions speak louder than words.
sentences.displayHtml: She says I'm the one, but her actions speak louder than words.

conversation.japanese: 彼女は僕が運命の人だなんて言うけど、言葉より行動の方が物語ってるからね。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: She only seemed to give you love when she was feeling down.
sentences.displayHtml: She only seemed to give you love when she was feeling down.

conversation.japanese: 確かに。彼女、自分が落ち込んでる時しか愛情をくれなかったし。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: I've been such a fool, but I've got to get away and let her go.
sentences.displayHtml: I've been such a fool, but I've got to get away and let her go.

conversation.japanese: その通りだよ。僕はバカだった。もう離れて、彼女を吹っ切らなきゃ。

conversation.speaker: A

sentences.text: It’s going to be tough since you love her so much.
sentences.displayHtml: It’s going to be tough since you love her so much.

conversation.japanese: あんなに彼女を愛してたんだから、辛いとは思うけど。

conversation.speaker: B

sentences.text: It is, but I'm going to pack my things and move out tonight.
sentences.displayHtml: It is, but I'm going to pack my things and move out tonight.

conversation.japanese: ああ。でも、今夜荷物をまとめて出て行くよ。
